payload.answer: The new memory may supersede the existing one: the existing memory says Sam currently works at Goldman, while the new memory says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. Safe actions available: approve_supersession to treat the new memory as replacing the older current-employment fact; keep_both if both should remain because the situation is ambiguous or time-dependent; reject_new if the new memory is incorrect; or edit to clarify wording, dates, or entities before saving.
